title: corynostylis pancheri
intro: Corynostylis pancheri is a type of flowering plant native to the Pacific islands, particularly in New Caledonia, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can be used to make herbal teas, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
